name: Four-Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces Pinto beans, rinsed and drained
16 ounces Kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in an ungreased 2-quart casserole.
2. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until heated through and bubbly.
3. Serve 8-10 servings.
